title: Family Dinner Night
headline: Feed the Whole Crew Without Breaking the Bank
body: Bring the family to Captains Fish and Chicken for a dinner everyone will love. Our combo dinners are packed with generous portions of fried fish, shrimp, or chicken, plus fries and bread. With prices between $10–$20 per person, you can treat the whole table without the hassle of cooking at home. Clean, welcoming, and always crispy.

faqs.question: Do you have seating for large families?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have tables that can accommodate groups of 6–8. For larger parties, arrive early or call ahead.

faqs.question: Is there a kids' menu?
faqs.answer: Our chicken tenders and catfish nuggets are perfect for kids. We also offer smaller portion sizes upon request.

faqs.question: Can we order for the whole family online?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Use UberEats or DoorDash to order family-size combos and have them delivered to your door.

faqs.question: Do you offer any family meal deals?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our Captain's Combo Dinner is the best value. Ask about seasonal family specials when you visit.

faqs.question: Is the restaurant kid-friendly?
faqs.answer: Very much so. We welcome families and keep the dining area clean and comfortable.

seo.title: Family Dinner at Captains Fish and Chicken | Cedar Rapids
seo.description: Bring the family to Captains Fish and Chicken for affordable combo dinners, fresh fried seafood, and crispy chicken in Cedar Rapids. Dine in or order online.

title: Game Day Grub
headline: The Perfect Lineup for Game Day
body: Whether you're watching the Hawkeyes, the Cyclones, or the big game, Captains Fish and Chicken has the food to fuel your fandom. Order a spread of fried shrimp, wings, and catfish nuggets with plenty of fries. Big portions mean leftovers — or enough to feed the whole watch party. Available for pickup and delivery through UberEats and DoorDash.

faqs.question: Can I place a large order for game day?
faqs.answer: Yes, we accept large orders. Call ahead for orders over $50 to ensure everything is ready on time.

faqs.question: Do you offer catering trays?
faqs.answer: We can package large orders in family trays. Call us to discuss your game day needs.

faqs.question: How fast is delivery on game day?
faqs.answer: Delivery times vary during peak hours. We recommend ordering early or choosing pickup.

faqs.question: What's the best item for a crowd?
faqs.answer: The 20pc wing platter and seafood combo are perfect for sharing. Add large fries for the table.

faqs.question: Do you stay open late on game days?
faqs.answer: We close at 10pm Mon–Sat and 9pm Sunday. Plan your order accordingly!

seo.title: Game Day Food | Wings, Shrimp & Fish in Cedar Rapids

title: Lunch Break
headline: Fast, Filling, and Under $15
body: Short on time but big on hunger? Captains Fish and Chicken serves up lunch that's fast, affordable, and satisfying. Our combo dinners come with fries and bread, and most items are under $15. Located at 1616 1st Ave NE in Cedar Rapids, we're easy to reach from downtown or the highway. Dine in or grab it to go.

faqs.question: How fast is lunch service?
faqs.answer: Most orders are ready in 10–15 minutes. Call ahead if you're in a rush.

faqs.question: Do you have lunch specials?
faqs.answer: Our Captain's Combo Dinner is always a great deal. Ask about any daily specials when you visit.

faqs.question: Is there parking nearby?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have convenient parking right outside our location on 1st Ave NE.

faqs.question: Can I order online for lunch pickup?
faqs.answer: Yes, order through UberEats or DoorDash for pickup or delivery.

faqs.question: What's the fastest item to order?
faqs.answer: Gizzards and fries are among our fastest items, ready in about 10 minutes.
